history.reason: All A1-A7 PASS empirically: audit 12 checks (8 contract-required all covered, contract_required_missing=NONE), malformed state count=0 in hot path with state_quarantine table preserving historical test_pragma row + timestamp + reason, WAL+busy_timeout=5000ms verified live on solar.db, concurrency test 5 workers all PASS exit=0 zero lock errors, resource_usage honestly reports missing (not faking healthy), solar status declares Option B local-only mode with explicit redirect to solar-harness, accepted_artifact_path auditable with status=warn, runbook exists 128 lines. 12 falsification angles all failed. 4 non-goals (no schema redesign / no SQLite migration / no production break / no silent delete) all honored. lib/solar-knowledge-context.py:368 also migrated to WAL — no split-brain. 3 low-severity warnings (overall=warn correctly reflects stale ledgers, sys_resources missing per non-goal, vault index pending downstream sprint) — all surfaces by design, not bugs.
